snippet.title: First Semifinal: United States vs. Dominican Republic

snippet.description: The Vanderbilt Commodores and the Arkansas Razorbacks go head to head in the SEC Men's Basketball Tournament Championship final. Darius Acuff Jr. leads Arkansas with 22.7 PPG and 6.4 APG, while Tyler Tanner leads Vanderbilt with 19.2 PPG and 5.2 APG.

snippet.title: Minecraft Pro VS 1000 Player Civilization
snippet.description:
435th eggchan hostage situation 

Minecraft Pro VS 1000 Player Civilization

Unstable SMP:
➜  @FlameFragsMC 
➜  @Spokeishere 
➜  ⁨@ParrotX2  
➜  ⁨@wemmbumc 

minor spoilers below

featuring: @yungymc 

music from:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC9UKPs9ZisfhMJdalnETLRg (tons of the music I use is by AZALI so check him out!) 

This is a Minecraft video recorded in the Unstable Universe / Unstable SMP that is staged for story-telling purposes; any more staged videos I upload will have a disclaimer in the description saying that they are also staged. Also, a lot of the game mechanics/glitches/redstone discussed in Unstable SMP videos are unique to the Unstable SMP / Unstable Universe and either will not work the same/do not exist in vanilla Minecraft. 

music also from: official minecraft soundtrack, official elder scrolls soundtracks, official enderal soundtrack, epidemic sound (https://www.epidemicsound.com), storyblocks (https://www.storyblocks.com), artlist (https://artlist.io), soundstripe (https://www.soundstripe.com), fesliyan studios (https://www.fesliyanstudios.com/royalty-free-music), and envato (https://elements.envato.com/)

Enderal Soundtrack (HQ): Prey - Beutezug https://youtu.be/TqrNKC7kybk by Marvin Kopp, licensed under CC BY 4.0 https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/

I Beat This Entire Factory Game With Basically No Factory - StarRupture - Let's Game It Out

----------

Check it out on Steam ► https://store.steampowered.com/app/1631270/StarRupture/

More about StarRupture (from Steam):

Explore a mysterious planet in an ever-changing open world torn by recurring cataclysms. Build a complex industrial system to extract resources, produce goods and expand your base. Fight against hordes of alien monsters to defend your base and survive, alone or with friends.

Explore this vast open world, rich in resources, places and secrets to be found. Discover the beauty of this constantly reborn dangerous world torn apart by repeated cataclysms.

Search, mine and process resources to develop your complex industrial system. Unlock new technologies that will allow you and your base to survive the harsh conditions on the planet.

The planet will surprise you at every turn. Extreme temperatures are not the only things you’ll be challenged with. Get ready to defend yourself, your team and your base from a horde of aggressive alien creatures.

Experience and survive everything you encounter on this harsh planet. Do it alone or in a group of up to 4 friends. This world is waiting for you to be discovered.

Funny Tycoon Games ► https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=UqaNKNgSxYI&list=PLrBjj4brdIRwf14QPGmfDXCQQrDs860ig

The Finest One-Offs ► https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=zIOFGCbwJSs&list=PLrBjj4brdIRwKf72d6spk7fSHhwwYuQu1

Some Truly Bizarre Games  ► https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=zIOFGCbwJSs&list=PLrBjj4brdIRyM5mUsHwPN0PH6UVNfeNl2

I Beat This Entire Factory Game With Basically No Factory - StarRupture - Let's Game It Out

----------

Check it out on Steam ► https://store.steampowered.com/app/1631270/StarRupture/

More about StarRupture (from Steam):

Explore a mysterious planet in an ever-changing open world torn by recurring cataclysms. Build a complex industrial system to extract resources, produce goods and expand your base. Fight against hordes of alien monsters to defend your base and survive, alone or with friends.

Explore this vast open world, rich in resources, places and secrets to be found. Discover the beauty of this constantly reborn dangerous world torn apart by repeated cataclysms.

Search, mine and process resources to develop your complex industrial system. Unlock new technologies that will allow you and your base to survive the harsh conditions on the planet.

The planet will surprise you at every turn. Extreme temperatures are not the only things you’ll be challenged with. Get ready to defend yourself, your team and your base from a horde of aggressive alien creatures.

Experience and survive everything you encounter on this harsh planet. Do it alone or in a group of up to 4 friends. This world is waiting for you to be discovered.
